security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://127.0.0.1:1420 ws://localhost:1420 http://127.0.0.1:1420; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first visual todo with image canvas
bundle.longDescription: TaskCanvas is a local-first visual todo and canvas app. Paste or drop images, arrange tasks on an infinite board, and keep everything on your own device with SQLite persistence and a portable .taskcanvas.zip backup format.
